name: Deja View - A Spot The Difference Game
short_description: Warning: Deja View is not for the faint of heart. NO ZOOM, no shortcuts—just 16 surreal, hand-drawn levels with 40 devilishly hidden differences in each. It’s tough by design. If you crave a serious challenge and love spotting the impossible, welcome. If not, consider yourself warned.
detailed_description:
This is not your average casual puzzle. Deja View is specifically crafted to push your focus and perception to their limits. There’s no zoom feature—by design—because each level is meant to reward patience, skill, and true attention to detail.

If you’re looking for a relaxing or easy experience, this may not be the game for you. We want to be completely honest: Deja View is built for those who enjoy a real challenge and don’t mind taking their time. Please consider this before you buy.

We’ve seen that some players, especially those looking for a more forgiving game, have found the difficulty overwhelming. If you do not want a demanding puzzle that will truly test you, we recommend looking elsewhere.
But if you crave intricate, handcrafted visual riddles, and you thrive on tough puzzles—Deja View will reward your perseverance.

  • NO ZOOM! (By design!)

  • 16 surrealistic hand-drawn illustrations with intricate visual storytelling.

  • Each illustration is split into two halves, forming a complex scene to analyze.

  • Find 20 unique differences in each part—40 total per level.

  • Expect a real challenge: some differences are cleverly hidden and will push your observation skills to the limit.

  • Earn hints as you progress and use them wisely.

  • Unlock achievements and uncover intriguing artwork descriptions.

  • Experience a rich, atmospheric soundtrack tailored to each illustration.

  • Relax between puzzles in the Jukebox, where you can enjoy unlocked music tracks.

  • Enjoy completed illustrations in full view mode to appreciate the art in its entirety.

Warning: This game is not easy—but that’s exactly what makes solving each puzzle so rewarding. If you crave a true test of focus and love getting lost in art, Deja View is for you.
